title: Price-to-Book Ratio Rankings by Sector 2026
description: Some S&P 500 stocks trade below the value of their own assets. We mapped P/B ratios across every sector to find the deepest value.

schemas.headline: Price-to-Book Ratio Rankings by Sector 2026
schemas.description: Analyze price-to-book (P/B) ratios across S&P 500 sectors. Discover deep value stocks with P/B below 1, sector medians, and outliers.
